name: Nightshift Foundry
notes: Phase grow. Named at ADR-011. Slug 'foundry' immutable. 10 plugins shipped across 4 categories (workflow/quality/context/meta). Window v0.7 (ADR-025). i218 (ADR-026, operator-directed PR): MASTER.md adopted at root - the reconciled org-pattern program (Stage 0 safe core -> proof artifacts -> integrate table-stakes -> launch -> build in public; ~9 build / ~10 buy / ~9 halo / ~6 defer). ADR-026 ratifies the SS14 agent contract (manifests under foundry/agents/, four hard rules, quota tiers shed low->high never product, single-writer orchestration precedence) and pre-authorizes Stage 0 tools/ work under the two-iteration rule; ADR-027..030 land with their items. Backlog seeded: P0.1 agent contract, P0.5 constitution+guard, AUTH-1 auth abstraction. Constitution floor effective now: schema changes human-ratified always; no agent edits its own governing rule; never auto-PR third-party repos. Gate left: Claude secret (CI token rejected; STOP present - regenerate via claude setup-token, update secret, one shift, delete STOP).

theme.name: Repo hygiene
theme.note: Plugins that surface the quiet debt a codebase accumulates — stale TODOs, missing tests, drifted toolchains, unreviewed dep bumps — and make it legible before it bites.
